backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the loan management backend with types and CRUD operations for loan products, borrower profiles, loan applications, and user profiles, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that TypeScript compilation errors (related to removed productId, missing imports, and React Query types) were fixed across several frontend components, hooks, and pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of each frontend source file describing their purpose and key implementation details, particularly noting removal of productId references and related fixes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'LoanLend USA' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, products, apply, dashboard, and admin pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider with a shared layout including Navigation, Footer, and a conditional ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/AdminApplication: Admin dialog modal for reviewing a loan application's details and updating its status with optional admin notes, using the useUpdateApplicationStatus mutation hook.
Admin table component displaying loan applications with search, status filtering, and sortable columns for date, amount, and status, with a view action per row.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationDetai: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a loan application, including status badge, application ID, borrower ID, requested amount, and formatted dates.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationForm/: Form step component for collecting personal information (name, email, date of birth, SSN last 4, address) with validation error display.
Form step component for collecting financial information including annual income, employment status, and credit score range via inputs and dropdowns.
Form step component for capturing loan-specific details: requested amount, term in months, and loan purpose with validation error display.
Read-only review step that summarizes all previously entered personal, financial, and loan details before final submission, with formatted labels and currency values.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationStatu: A small badge component that renders a color-coded label for each loan application status (pending, under review, approved, rejected, disbursed).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, loan type list, and contact details, along with copyright and legal disclaimer text.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and an authenticated user dropdown menu supporting login, logout, dashboard, and admin access.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name and email on first login, validates the inputs, and saves the profile via the backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for backend interactions, covering user profiles, loan products, borrower profiles, loan applications, and admin operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Playfair Display fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including brand tokens (navy, gold) and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that fetches all loan applications and displays them in a table, with access control based on caller admin status and a detail modal for reviewing individual applications.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFormPage.t: Multi-step loan application form page with four steps (personal info, financial info, loan details, review), per-step validation, and submission logic that registers the borrower and submits the application.
frontend/src/pages/BorrowerDashboardPage: Borrower dashboard page showing summary stats and a list of the authenticated user's loan applications, with status badges and a detail modal for each application.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing home page featuring a hero section, loan product highlights fetched from the backend, step-by-step process cards, and stat cards to drive users to apply or view products.
frontend/src/pages/LoanProductsPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all available loan products in a responsive card grid, showing interest rate, amount range, term, and an apply button for each product.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH-based color palettes (navy, gold, status colors), typography/container-query plugins, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing a USA loan lending platform, its existing features, known issues (broken admin panel, build/deploy errors), and architectural notes around US lending compliance and PII security.
